view.title: Ona Webhusaiti {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Une chokwadi here kuti unoda kutumira zvakare imero yokukutsigira?
view.emailSentMessage: Imero yokukutsigira yatumirwa zvakare. Tarisa inbox yako.

buyIp.title: Tenga IP ye-Add-on Yakawedzerwa
buyIp.costDescription: Mutengo ({symbol}) mwedzi wose webhusaiti yako inobhadharwa
buyIp.confirmMessage: Mutengo weIP yakawedzerwa: {symbol}{cost}/mwedzi. Une chokwadi here kuti unoda kuoda IP yakawedzerwa?

migration.title: Endesai Webhusaiti Yako
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Kana saiti iri mubasa / saiti inofamba ine traffic yakawanda, tinogona kuisa peji yokubata munguva yekunyamutsa here?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Saiti iyi ine zvinodiwa zvakasarudzika sePHP Version / Modules here?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Unodawo kuti tikubatsire kunyamutsa kushandiswa kwedomain yako here?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Unoda kuti tishandure maserver emazita pano zvino tapedza kunyamutsa data here?
migration.note1: Kuzadza fomu iyi kuchasara tikiti idzva yedhasibhodhi yedu kuti ritange kunyamutsa kwako.
migration.note2: Ndapota ive wakachena uye wakakwana nguva dzose kuti udzivirire kucheneswa.
migration.note3: Kunyamutsa kwazvo kwapedza mukati memaawa 48 kusvika 72. Dzimwe nguva kunenge kupfuura kana data yakakura.
migration.note4: Akaunti yakare yekubata kweweb inofanira kuva online uye inowanikwa tichinyamutsa, zvingaita kuti tibate zvakaoma.
migration.note5: Ndapota usaite shanduko pazviziviso zvako tichinyamutsa, izvo zvinogona kushaikwa pa hosting idzva.
